title: Cozy Ingredients
description: A core mod that adds ingredients and items used across all our Cozy-themed mods.
body:
## Cozy Ingredients
**Cozy Ingredients** is the core mod in the Cozy mod series, designed to bring warmth and charm to your Minecraft kitchen!

This mod adds a wide variety of realistic cooking ingredients such as cheese, butter, salt, jams, and more - most of them serving as the basic ingredients for advanced recipes in Cozy Café mod.

We've also introduced a fully functional **Toaster** block that lets you prepare delicious toasts. Overcook it? No problem - you'll get charcoal instead. We'll slowly include more functioning blocks like these in future updates.

_(This mod does not add much content and is not supposed to be used as a standalone mod, rather it's supposed to be used alongside Cozy Café and our future Cozy mods!)_

![List of items in 1.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7e20f6284f3fe7e0c73e4bdc7a96815f51b5367.png)

## Current Version Support
- Supported on Fabric 1.20.1 so far
- 1.21+ support planned
- Forge/NeoForge support is not yet planned tho, might come after we add more content

## ⚠️ This mod is required by all our Cozy mods!
Our current Cozy mods: [Cozy Café](https://modrinth.com/mod/cozy-cafe-mod)

If you need any help or have any suggestions for future updates, please join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/QwH2ZQa)!

## ✨ Discover more of our projects on our website!
[![website image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64cc0402e80a62b192f8cd533228196a60a2714d.png)](https://withrage.com/)
